creator: jkois@freebsd.org
text:
-----BEGIN PGP SIGNED MESSAGE-----
Hash: SHA1

Hello,

First thanks for sending in this PR.  The problem is there is nothing we
can do about that right away.

1.  The FreeBSD Foundation is NOT directly related to the FreeBSD
Project.  But these JAVA packages are provided by the Foundation.  NOT
by the Project.  So this request would need to be sent to the FreeBSD
Foundation directly.
2.  The JAVA packages offered by the Foundation are certified packages
under a special license agreement with Sun (which is now Oracle).  So it
is NOT possible to "just" compile 8.X packages (the license does NOT
allow that).

Good thing is the 7.X packages can also be installed under 8.X.
Additionally it is possible to install JAVA from source (The license
used by Sun prevents us from providing binary packages for JAVA).  See
http://www.freebsd.org/doc/en/books/handbook/desktop-browsers.html for
more information.

Conclusion:  I will close this PR.  As there is nothing to do.


jkois

- -- 
 Johann Kois
 jkois(at)FreeBSD.org
 FreeBSD Documentation Project
 FreeBSD German Documentation Project - https://doc.bsdgroup.de
